bps.formula: Weighted by platform trust × sentiment × engagement | Coverage bonus for multi-platform presence
bps.interpretation: Brand barely visible online. Urgent action needed.

actionables.action: 10 Quora questions found. Answer unanswered ones first
actionables.why: Quora answers rank on Google. Each answer is passive SEO for admission keywords
actionables.content_idea: Write 300-word answer: personal story → curriculum → placement data → call to action

actionables.action: No Medium articles found. Publish 2 this month
actionables.why: Medium articles index fast, rank for long-tail queries, and LLMs cite them
actionables.content_idea: 'My BTech journey at Polaris School of Technology' / 'How Polaris prepares you for AI roles'

actionables.action: Create Wikipedia page for Polaris School of Technology
actionables.why: ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini pull from Wikipedia as primary citation
actionables.content_idea: Draft: Founded year, programs (BTech Applied AI, PM&E, Cloud), AICTE recognition, campus, notable placements

actionables.action: Add Polaris to Wikidata and Crunchbase
actionables.why: Wikidata feeds Google Knowledge Panel. Crunchbase feeds LLM training data
actionables.content_idea: Add: institution name, website, location, programs, year founded

actionables.action: BPS Grade D — Increase content seeding across 3 platforms simultaneously
actionables.why: Low ORM coverage means prospective students find nothing or find competitors
actionables.content_idea: Run 30-day blitz: 3 Quora answers/week + 1 Reddit thread/week + 1 Medium article every 2 weeks
